name: M&m Chocolate-Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large mixing bowl, cream margarine and sugars until smooth.
3. Add egg and vanilla extract, then beat until light and fluffy.
4. Gradually blend in flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt until combined.
5. Stir in M&M's Semi-Sweet Chocolate Candies until evenly distributed.
6. Drop heaping tablespoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake for 9-13 minutes or until lightly golden.
8. Cool on the cookie sheets for 1 minute, then transfer to wire cooling racks.
9. Store in a tightly covered container. Makes approximately 3 dozen cookies.
